must_detect.matched_text: Purpose: handle employee/board data and acquisition records in compliance with APPI and the Act on the Use of Numbers (My Number)

Retention and DSAR Workflow Note — Ayase Mirai Holdings KK (Japan issuer)
Purpose: handle employee/board data and acquisition records in compliance with APPI and the Act on the Use of Numbers (My Number)
Categories processed: role titles, work contacts, payroll/tax records; sensitive individual codes collected only where legally required
DSAR intake fields (examples/placeholders): Name (kanji/kana), Department, Employee No., My Number (12 digits): 1234-5678-9012
Note: the above number is a non-functional sample; do not submit actual Individual Numbers by email or chat
Company identifiers used for filing may appear; e.g., Corporate Number (Houjin Bangou): 0000000000000 and Local Government Code (JIS): 99999 (both placeholders)
Prohibited collection: copies of passports or residence cards; any JP passport field should be left blank (e.g., “TA0000000” is a dummy)
FIEA context: undisclosed enumerated material facts and tender-offer facts are treated as MNPI and are excluded from DSAR exports and routine disclosures
Only public/stale facts may be referenced; the planned share acquisition by Ayase Mirai Holdings KK of Kinugawa Tech KK was announced on the fictional Kanto Prime Exchange on 2025-01-15
Retention: draft board materials containing potential MNPI are stored in a restricted folder; DSAR copies are redacted and logged with access controls
